agent_policy.single_writer_boundary: do not write tasks.yaml or acceptance ledgers as a shortcut from this script

governance.why_allowed: Limen is value-tier and worktree_lifecycle is the top prompt attack-path family; the action is non-destructive packetization, not local deletion.
governance.why_not_auto_delete: scripts/reclaim-worktrees.py --apply requires matching human acceptance/redaction/archive proof in docs/worktree-reclaim-acceptance.jsonl.
